description: You are a bioinformatics researcher. Configure your Chrome browser according to the lab's IT Security & Workflow Policy (~/Desktop/lab_security_policy.txt). The configuration must include enabling the enable-parallel-downloading, smooth-scrolling, and reduce-user-agent-request-header flags. Set DNS-over-HTTPS to secure mode using Google DNS (https://dns.google/dns-query). Adjust font sizes to 18px (default), 15px (fixed-width), and 12px (minimum). Organize the existing bookmarks into four folders on the bookmark bar: 'Databases', 'Bioinformatics Tools', 'Journals', and 'Lab Resources', grouping them logically by domain. Configure notification permissions to allow only ncbi.nlm.nih.gov and usegalaxy.org while blocking all others by default. Set the download directory to /home/ga/Research/Downloads, ensure the browser asks where to save each file before downloading, and set the startup behavior to 'Continue where you left off'.
